title: Software License Agreement - TechCorp
text:
SOFTWARE LICENSE AGREEMENT

This Software License Agreement ('Agreement') is entered into as of January 15, 2026.

LICENSE GRANT: TechCorp grants Customer a non-exclusive license to use the Software.

PAYMENT: Customer shall pay all fees within 30 days of invoice.

TERMINATION: Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice.

LIMITATION OF LIABILITY: TechCorp shall not be liable for any damages whatsoever.

GOVERNING LAW: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of Delaware.

title: Data Processing Agreement - CloudServe Inc
text:
DATA PROCESSING AGREEMENT

This Data Processing Agreement ('DPA') is entered into between CloudServe Inc ('Processor') and Client ('Controller').

DATA PROCESSING: Processor will process personal data only on documented instructions from Controller.

SUB-PROCESSORS: Processor may engage sub-processors without prior consent from Controller.

DATA TRANSFERS: Personal data may be transferred to any country where Processor operates.

SECURITY: Processor will implement appropriate technical measures.

BREACH NOTIFICATION: Processor will notify Controller of any data breach.

DATA RETENTION: Data will be retained for business purposes.

title: Employment Contract - Acme Corp
text:
EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT

This Employment Agreement is made between Acme Corp ('Employer') and John Smith ('Employee').

POSITION: Employee is hired as Senior Developer.

COMPENSATION: Employee shall receive $120,000 annually, paid bi-weekly.

BENEFITS: Employee is eligible for health insurance after 90 days.

TERMINATION: Employer may terminate employment at any time without cause or notice.

NON-COMPETE: Employee agrees not to work for any competitor for 5 years after termination, anywhere in the world.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY: All work product belongs to Employer.

DISPUTE RESOLUTION: All disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration.

title: Vendor Services Agreement - SupplyChain Pro
text:
VENDOR SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Agreement is between SupplyChain Pro ('Vendor') and Buyer Corp ('Buyer').

SERVICES: Vendor will provide logistics and warehousing services.

PRICING: Prices are subject to change at any time without notice.

INDEMNIFICATION: Buyer shall indemnify Vendor against all claims, including those arising from Vendor's negligence.

FORCE MAJEURE: Vendor is excused from performance for any reason beyond its control.

INSURANCE: Buyer shall maintain adequate insurance coverage.

CONFIDENTIALITY: Both parties agree to keep confidential information private.

ASSIGNMENT: Vendor may assign this agreement without consent.

title: SaaS Subscription Agreement - DataFlow
text:
SAAS SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT

This Subscription Agreement governs use of DataFlow's cloud services.

SUBSCRIPTION: Customer subscribes to the Professional tier for 12 months.

FEES: $500/month, billed annually in advance. No refunds for early termination.

DATA OWNERSHIP: Customer retains ownership of their data.

DATA LOCATION: Data will be stored in our global data centers.

UPTIME: DataFlow targets 99% uptime but makes no guarantees.

SECURITY: DataFlow implements industry-standard security practices.

PRIVACY: Customer data may be used to improve our services.

TERMINATION: Upon termination, data will be deleted within 90 days.

title: Consulting Agreement - Strategy Partners
text:
CONSULTING SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Agreement is between Strategy Partners LLC ('Consultant') and Client Corp ('Client').

SERVICES: Consultant will provide strategic advisory services as mutually agreed.

COMPENSATION: Client shall pay $300/hour for all services rendered.

EXPENSES: Client will reimburse all reasonable expenses without requiring receipts.

CONFIDENTIALITY: Consultant agrees to keep Client information confidential for 1 year.

INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR: Consultant is an independent contractor.

TERM: This agreement is effective until terminated by either party.

LIABILITY: Consultant's liability is limited to fees paid in the last 30 days.

NO WARRANTIES: Services are provided 'as-is' without any warranties.
